top_signals.title: The Great Hotel Room Blanding
top_signals.summary: It's getting harder and harder to tell the difference between a $300-a-night room and one that costs many more times that. Bloomberg's Brandon Presser explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ZachXBT flags suspected exploit involving Polymarket’s UMA adapter contract on Polygon
top_signals.summary: Onchain sleuth ZachXBT flagged a potential exploit of Polymarket's UMA CTF Adapter on Polygon, with $520K reportedly drained so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US and Canada arrest and charge suspected Kimwolf botnet admin
top_signals.summary: U.S. and Canadian authorities arrested and charged a Canadian man with operating the KimWolf distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) botnet, which infected nearly two million devices worldwide. [...]
